claims.claim: All seven radios are Zone 1 IIC T4 certified
claims.evidence: Verified against manufacturer certificates of conformity and product datasheets

claims.claim: Motorola DP4401Ex is the most widely deployed ATEX DMR radio in oil & gas
claims.evidence: Based on manufacturer market share data and industry analyst reports

claims.claim: PoC radios (IS440.1) require no dedicated radio infrastructure
claims.evidence: PoC operates over cellular LTE networks; verified via manufacturer specifications

methodology: Specifications sourced from manufacturer datasheets and certificates of conformity. No vendor sponsorship or affiliate relationships.
